title: Prison Train
writer: Leonardo Bercovici, Shepard Traube, Spencer Towne
actors: Fred Keating, Dorothy Comingore, Clarence Muse
plot: Frankie Terris and Mannie Robbins are the two most powerful gangsters in their city. Frankie has a young sister, Louise, whom he has kept at a boarding school away from the stench of his racketeering. Mannie's young son, Joe, is a...
